title: Shades
description: Shades adds some cool shades. They are craftable, can be worn, give you night vision (at night), and armor stands wearing them will dance to jukebox music.
body:
# About

Shades adds some wearable cool shades!

# Features

## Cool Shades

These can be crafted using two sticks and two blocks of tinted glass.

They can be worn as a helment and can be repaired in an anvil with tinted glass.

## Sunglasses at Night

If you wear your sunglasses (cool shades) at night, you'll will be given night vision.

## Dancing Armor Stands

Armor stands that wear cool shades will "dance" to jukebox music.

All vanilla music disc BPM's have been detected for a smoother dancing effect. Any other discs will have armor stands dancing to a default BPM of 120.
